---
title: "r audit"
date: "03/18/2026"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
---

# Import School Quality
```{r}
#| label: load readr
library(readr)
```

```{r}
#| label: load data.table
library(data.table)
```

```{r}
#| label: load school_quality.csv
file <- "../data/school_quality.csv"
# school_quality <- read.table(file=file, header=TRUE, sep=",")
# school_quality <- read_delim(file=file, delim=",") 
school_quality <- fread(input=file, sep=',', header=TRUE)
head(school_quality)
```
